subject: A spiked skull-faced mask mounted on a wooden wall, flanked by a knife and a chain, displayed as trophies or tools
description: A pale, skull-shaped mask dominates the center of the frame, mounted as if on display on a dark wooden plank surface. The mask has multiple metal spikes projecting from the top, rivets driven into the surface, scratch marks, and a wide jaw filled with protruding jagged teeth. Blood-colored staining is visible around the mouth. To the left hangs a fixed-blade knife with a wrapped handle. To the right hangs a heavy chain. Additional small objects are visible at the lower corners — possibly a wooden handle or baton and other tools. The composition is a still-life of horror implements arranged as if on a killer's trophy wall.
foreground: skull mask with spikes, rivets, bloody teeth, mounted on wood planks
background: dark wood plank surface, purple-brown tones
